Profile
The main thing I remember about my childhood is that my desire to research and learn is as alive
as it is today. I have been especially interested in getting to know different cultures and learning
different languages and literature since my childhood. I chose language as my main field during
high school. Afterward, I majored in American Culture and Literature at Ankara University and
progressed in the fields of language and literature. In my third year of university, I started
studying Arabic at TÖMER, a language institution affiliated with Ankara University and
graduated with a B2 diploma. At the same time, I had the opportunity to study different
languages by taking two years of French in high school and two years of German at university. I
have been working as an English teacher for the last two years, although not regularly. During
this process, I experienced the pride and pleasure of being able to teach English to many
children. In the meantime, I want to become more academically competent and work as an
academic one day, in connection with the experiences I have gained and my interests. I can
describe myself as determined and curious. I pursue my interests and goals until I achieve
success in the fields, I am interested in. Because of my curiosity, my interests do not decrease, on
the contrary, they increase day by day. That's why I always focus on development, knowledge,
and experience.
Education and Qualifications
Ankara University- Department of American Culture and Literature 2020/-
I am currently an active senior student. My expected graduation date is July 2024. I have
a 3.74 GPA out of 4.
Ayranci Aysel Yuceturk Anatolian High School Diploma 19/06/2020
Work Experiences
Teaching English 2022/2024
I taught exam-oriented and general English, especially to primary and secondary school •
children. My general English lessons progressed through creative writing, speaking,
listening, and artistic activities, as well as grammar education.
Project Consultant Internship in International Agriculture and Food Confederation July/August
2023

My job description was generally to find non-governmental organizations operating in •
the fields of food, agriculture, and environmentalism throughout Europe, to collect
information that would help the confederation to communicate correctly with these non-
governmental organizations, to translate where necessary, and to list the information I
found.
Free Lance Translation 06/04/2023-08/04/2023
I translated approximately 30 pages of a hospital's website into English as a freelance for •
a software company.
Language Skills
IELTS English exam (Academic) 7 points out of 9. 15/12/2023
Ankara University TÖMER B2 Arabic Diploma 15/12/2023
Hobbies and Interests
Learning New Languages: It has always excited me that learning a language is a door opening
to different cultures and different people. For this reason, I studied many different languages
both at school and on my own. Besides English, the language in which I improved myself the
most was Arabic. Now I can't wait to learn new languages.
Reading: I have been in touch with books and literature since the moment I learned to read.
Exploring the magical world of literature for long hours is the best way for me to spend my free
time.
Archery: I did archery for about two years during my secondary school years. Archery is a sport
that requires a lot of discipline and attention. During this period, I won one bronze and one silver
medal from the competitions held within the club. The biggest contribution of this sport to me is
that it teaches me discipline, patience, and perseverance.
Drawing: I have been interested in drawing since my first encounter with pencils and paints.
During my primary school years, I took a drawing course from my school's art teacher. In
addition to drawing, I am interested in many subjects such as art history, especially related to
visual arts.
